title: AI vaults on Hyperliquid with @neuravaults
summary_title: Neurovolts: AI-Managed Yield Vaults Launch on Hyperliquid EVM
summary_description: Hamza, ex-Polygon DeFi head, discusses newly-launched AI agents optimizing stablecoin yields 30-40% above lending markets with zero leverage risk.

key_moments.label: Space goes live after technical difficulties; Hamza joins
Hamza announces mainnet launch timing coinciding with Hyperliquid event in UAE
Zerk introduces Hamza as ex-Polygon DeFi head, bootstrapped builder in crypto
Discussion of why AI vault strategy chosen over directional trading agents
Deep dive into mechanics: deposits, withdrawals, and underlying yield sources
Explanation of 41% outperformance metric and AI size-aware allocation logic
Roadmap preview: transparency features, new stablecoins (USDH), more yield sources
Closing remarks; Hamza expresses bullishness on Hyperliquid EVM and agents in DeFi
